ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination strategy */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group classification (e.g., LMIC) */,
  "target_pop" INTEGER /* Target population size */,
  "hs_constraints" TEXT /* Health system constraints */,
  "vaccine_doses" INTEGER /* Number of vaccine doses required */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vaccine type */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the variant */,
  "region" TEXT /* Specific region or country where the strategy is applied */,
  "vaccine_storage_requirements" TEXT /* Storage conditions required for the vaccine */,
  "transportation_constraints" TEXT /* Constraints related to vaccine transportation */,
  "logistics_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of logistics for the vaccination campaign */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments related to the strategy */,
  "max_coverage" REAL /* Maximum coverage percentage */,
  "age_groups_covered" INTEGER /* Age groups covered by the vaccination strategy */,
  "vacc_start" TEXT /* Start date for vaccination */,
  "dt" REAL /* Duration in weeks for coverage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_strategies_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variant_impacts ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_strategies_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccine_data ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccine_data" (
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccine */,
  "vaccine_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine */,
  "efficacy" REAL /* Efficacy rate of the vaccine */,
  "dose_interval" INTEGER /* Interval between doses in days */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the vaccine manufacturer */,
  "storage_temperature" TEXT /* Required storage temperature for the vaccine */,
  "shelf_life" INTEGER /* Shelf life of the vaccine in days */,
  "booster_dose_required" INTEGER /* Whether a booster dose is required */,
  "booster_dose_interval" INTEGER /* Interval for booster dose in days, if required */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Common side effects of the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coverage_statistics" (
  "coverage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coverage record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated vaccination strategy */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination administration */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Number of doses administered on that date */,
  "population_covered" INTEGER /* Total population covered by the strategy up to this date */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vaccine type */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Specific age group covered by the doses */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the vaccinated population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity distribution of the vaccinated population */,
  "vaccination_site" TEXT /* Location where the vaccination was administered */,
  "vaccinator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who administered the vaccine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coverage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_statistics_vaccinator_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccinator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_statistics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES vaccination_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coverage_statistics_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccine_data ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variant_impacts" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "fold_reduction" REAL /* Reduction factor in vaccine efficacy due to the variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant characteristics */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vaccine type */,
  "transmission_rate" REAL /* Transmission rate of the variant */,
  "mortality_rate" REAL /* Mortality rate associated with the variant */,
  "hospitalization_rate" REAL /* Hospitalization rate associated with the variant */,
  "symptomatic_rate" REAL /* Symptomatic rate associated with the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variant_impacts_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccine_data ("vaccine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated scenario */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vaccination strategy used */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was conducted */,
  "infected_cases" INTEGER /* Number of infected cases projected in the simulation */,
  "vaccinated_population" INTEGER /* Total population vaccinated under the strategy */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the variant */,
  "vaccine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vaccine type */,
  "scenario_description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation scenario */,
  "initial_infected_cases" INTEGER /* Number of initial infected cases in the simulation */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population in the simulation */,
  "projection_period" INTEGER /* Duration of the projection period in weeks */,
  "variant_prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the variant in the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_vaccine_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccine_id") REFERENCES vaccine_data ("vaccine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES vaccination_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES variant_impacts ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
